metadata.title: IIIB Certification | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: We proudly present the Certificate in Islamic Banking and Finance as a unique case-study driven certificate by International Institute of Islamic Bankers, which provides you a carefully designed blend of basic principles coupled with their practical implementation.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login About the Course About IIIB Certificate Courses If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Why Certificate In Islamic Banking And Finance (CIBF)? We proudly present the Certificate in Islamic Banking and Finance as a unique case-study driven certificate by International Institute of Islamic Bankers, which provides you a carefully designed blend of basic principles coupled with their practical implementation. The curriculum of this course has been designed to cover all the areas of Islamic Banking and Finance. It facilitates the reader to understand the major and important concepts of Islamic Banking in an effective manner. Meezan Bank’s qualified team of professionals and Shariah scholars work hand in hand with the course developers to improve the course quality based on latest research and development. Course Contents MODULE – 01 (CONCEPT BUILDING) Islamic Banking Introduction, Background and Global Scenario The Islamic Economic System Factors of Production in Islam, Capitalism & Socialism Views of Islam on Savings & Wealth Classification of Riba Law of Contract Rules of Sale MODULE – 02 (ISLAMIC MODES OF FINANCE - l) Murabaha Documentation & Applications of Murabaha Process Flows & Calculation Introduction to Istisna Salam Import Financing Export Financing MODULE – 03 OF FINANCE - ll) Ijarah Documentation and Practical Issues Practical Application Tijarah Musharakah Diminishing Musharakah Diminishing Musharakah Documentation MODULE – 04 (DEPOSIT STRUCTURE, ISLAMIC INVESTMENTS, TAKAFUL & QUALITY ASSURANCE) Mudarabah Structure of Mudarabah Based Deposits Products Islamic Investment Funds Sukuk Project Financing Takaful Shariah Audit & Compliance in Islamic Financial Institutions Course Duration Four months Assessment Criteria IIIB accesses students through four assignments in every module and one final comprehensive online exam. These assignments which are to be submitted online comprise of short questions on conceptual understanding and practical implementation of the topics covered in the relevant module. Upcoming Courses - Certificate in Shariah Audit (CSA) - Certificate in Islamic Capital Markets - (CICM) - Certificate in Takaful (CT) Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Would you like more information about this course? Fill out the form below and you will be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
